title: M&G 76 X 51MM STICKY FLAGS ( PET ) ( 5 COLOURS * 20 SHEETS )
subtitle: M&G 76 X 51MM
overview: Our M&G 76X51MM Sticky Flags are designed to serve as labels or bookmarks, making it easy to look up important information quickly. They are transparent and can mark key points without obscuring the text, and are both waterproof and shock-resistant for added durability. The round hole baseboard allows the notes to fit securely in a loose-leaf book, and the option for multiple colours allows for easy organization of important information. It is a versatile and essential tool for students, professionals, and anyone else who needs to keep track of important information.

title: M&G 2*6 STICKY NOTES ( 8 * 20 SHEETS ) * SO MANY CATS
subtitle: M&G 2*6 STICKY NOTES
overview: M&G "So Many Cats" Sticky Notes offer adorable cat designs for efficient note-taking, reminders, and memos. They function as labels or bookmarks for quick reference without obstructing text, ideal for textbooks and documents. Crafted with waterproof and shock-resistant materials, these notes are durable and reliable. With various cat styles available, they add a touch of fun to your productivity.

title: M&G 3*4 NEON STICKY NOTES ( 4 COLOURS * 25 SHEETS )
subtitle: M&G 3*4 NEON STICKY
overview: Our M&G 3x4 Neon sticky notes come in a set of four bright and vibrant colours, each with 25 sheets, making them a great choice for colour coding and organization. The compact size of these sticky notes makes them perfect for quick notes, reminders, and to-do lists, while the adhesive backing ensures that they stay in place. The variety of colours allows for easy categorization and makes it easy to find the note you need at a glance. These sticky notes are a great tool for students, teachers, and professionals alike.

title: M&G 3*3 TRANSPARENT STICKY NOTE ( 50 SHEETS ) ( PET )
subtitle: M&G 3*3 TRANSPARENT STICKY
overview: M&G Transparent Sticky Notes are designed for unobstructed annotations and marking. Their clear design ensures they won't block the original content on the page, making them ideal for adding notes to books or marking important documents without staining. These transparent notes can be repeatedly pasted, and their visibility allows for easy tracing. They are available in plain and grid-type options, making them versatile for note-taking or creating diagrams and graphs

title: M&G 20 X 50MM STICKY NOTES ( 5 COLOURS * 100 SHEETS )
subtitle: M&G 20 X 50MM
overview: The M&G Sticky Notes (YS-478) offers an efficient and versatile solution for office organization, note-taking, and document indexing. These 20 x 50mm sticky notes come in a pack of 100 sheets, featuring 5 vibrant colors that are ideal for marking, highlighting, and indexing. With repositionable adhesive, these notes can be moved and reused without damaging surfaces. Perfect for home, office, or school use.

title: M&G 44*25MM USTIC SIGN HERE STICKY FLAGS ( 2*50 SHEETS )
subtitle: M&G 44*25MM USTIC SIGN
overview: Product Introduction: The M&G Ustic "Sign Here" Sticky Flags provide a practical solution for marking important documents, contracts, and pages with clear "Sign Here" arrow indicators. With 100 sheets per set (50 sheets x 2), these vibrant sticky flags are perfect for office use, helping to ensure your paperwork is properly organized and easy to navigate. Product Highlights: Clear "Sign Here" Arrow Design: Ensures important sections of documents are easily spotted. 100 Sheets Per Set: Includes 2 packs of 50 sheets, perfect for frequent office use. Easy-to-Use Sticky Flags: Sticks securely to paper and removes cleanly without leaving residue. Bright Colors for High Visibility: The yellow arrow with red text enhances document marking and organization. Compact & Portable: Easy to store and transport, perfect for offices, meetings, and on-the-go use. Ideal for Legal Documents & Contracts: Ensures that signing areas are never missed in important paperwork. Flag Size: 44mm (L) x 25mm(W) Pack
